name: State of London Data Pipeline
postCreateCommand: mkdir -p ~/R/library && R -e 'dir.create(Sys.getenv("R_LIBS_USER"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE); .libPaths(Sys.getenv("R_LIBS_USER")); install.packages(c("targets", "tibble", "tarchetypes", "dplyr", "tidyr", "purrr", "readr", "jsonlite", "lubridate", "openxlsx2", "readxl", "rlang"), repos = "https://cloud.r-project.org")'
